summary_intro: Patient Robert Miller is here for a follow-up assessment interview.

summary_sections.heading: Patient Reports Ongoing Challenges
summary_sections.content: Robert reports ongoing challenges with sleep hygiene and minor difficulties maintaining focus during afternoon work hours.

details.heading: Current Health and Core Symptoms
details.content: Morning productivity has improved, but Robert experiences significant cognitive fatigue after 2:00 PM. He wakes up frequently between 3:00 AM and 5:00 AM and struggles to return to sleep.

details.heading: Medication Management
details.content: Robert is currently prescribed 15mg of a generic stimulant, taken daily at 8:00 AM. He reports no adverse cardiovascular side effects but has noticed a slight decrease in appetite during lunch.

details.heading: Workplace Environment
details.content: He recently transitioned to a hybrid work model, spending three days in an open-plan office. The ambient noise is distracting and he started wearing noise-canceling headphones to cope.

details.heading: Personal Life
details.content: Robert mentioned recent mild stress regarding an upcoming cross-country move scheduled for next month.

next_steps: Begin a trial of taking his medication slightly later in the morning to extend its efficacy into the afternoon.
Keep a sleep diary for the next two weeks to identify any specific nighttime awakenings.
Schedule a follow-up virtual appointment for April 14, 2026.
